findings.problem: The chapter runs two command-confrontation scenes that land nearly the same leverage beat (Lena demands integrity; authority says stand down/control), so momentum stalls before Rao's later fragment turn.
findings.rewrite_direction: At snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_11.md:331 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_11.md:349, add one materially new consequence not already delivered in snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_11.md:135 or snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_11.md:147 (for example: documented communication restriction, explicit disciplinary trigger, or access cutoff), then show Lena changing strategy before snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_11.md:377.
findings.acceptance_test: PASS if the hospital exchange introduces one irreversible new consequence and a visibly new Lena tactic before line 377; FAIL if it repeats the same accusation/denial stalemate already used at lines 135-147.

findings.problem: Sanitization drift: at the exact point where institutional theft should feel most concrete, the seizure is compressed into procedural summary (truck nearly full, quantity pending), which softens the lived violence of losing custody.
findings.rewrite_direction: Expand the seizure aftermath at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_11.md:215 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_11.md:255 with scene-level detail: one specific item handoff, one explicit refusal/override of local logging, and one irreversible material loss Lena can directly witness before snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_11.md:269.
findings.acceptance_test: PASS if revised lines show a concrete contested transfer with named item(s), explicit who blocked signature/logging, and an observable loss consequence; FAIL if the loss remains summarized as bulk movement or 'quantity pending final count.'

findings.problem: Timidity: Beau's injury is rendered physically, but Lena's immediate culpability and emotional aftermath are quickly displaced by procedural motion, which retreats from the full emotional reality the scene establishes.
findings.rewrite_direction: Between snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_11.md:189 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_11.md:275, add interior consequence beats for Lena (somatic shock, self-assessment, and tactical guilt) before the Rao call so the scene does not pivot straight from fracture to logistics.
findings.acceptance_test: PASS if the revised span contains at least two explicit Lena interior beats tied to Beau's injury before line 275; FAIL if triage transitions directly into procedural phone coordination without internal reckoning.

findings.problem: Kearns and Clay converge into similar polished bureaucratic cadence under pressure, reducing idiolect separation and creating stretches of over-formal command speech.
findings.rewrite_direction: Differentiate authority voices in-place: make Kearns at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_11.md:115 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_11.md:121 clipped and federal-procedural, while Clay at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_11.md:135, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_11.md:337, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_11.md:349 should carry his paternal local-performance register with moderate contractions and evasive courtesy.
findings.acceptance_test: PASS if a cold read of the revised confrontation lines lets a reader attribute at least four lines correctly to Clay vs Kearns without dialogue tags because syntax/lexicon are distinct; FAIL if both still read as interchangeable institutional voice.

findings.problem: Elliptical clipped narration recurs in violation of the constitution's anti-clipping rule (subject/auxiliary dropped for punch), which reads as stylized shorthand instead of controlled compression.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rewrite fragment clusters at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_11.md:37, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_11.md:43, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_11.md:243, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_11.md:305 into grammatically complete sentences with explicit subject-verb structure while preserving pace.
findings.acceptance_test: PASS if each targeted line is a complete clause/sentence and no standalone 'Not ...' or 'Because ...' fragment remains in those beats; FAIL if clipped fragment cadence persists at the cited lines.

findings.problem: A recurring reveal formula ("There it was") appears three times, flattening emphasis and signaling autopilot rather than scene-specific discovery language.
findings.rewrite_direction: Keep at most one instance of the construction (strongest candidate: snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_11.md:149) and rewrite snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_11.md:243 plus snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_11.md:305 with distinct sensory or psychological phrasing tied to each moment.
findings.acceptance_test: PASS if 'There it was' appears no more than once in the revised chapter and the two revised beats are non-interchangeable in imagery; FAIL if the same reveal template still appears three times.

findings.problem: The hospital Clay exchange runs 10+ consecutive paragraphs without Lena interiority (thought, sensation, memory, self-assessment), so the focalization thins into transcript-like coverage.
findings.rewrite_direction: Insert interior beats into the cited run, especially around snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_11.md:329, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_11.md:337, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_11.md:343, to keep close-third anchoring active during dialogue pressure.
findings.acceptance_test: PASS if revised lines 325-343 include at least three explicit Lena interior beats and no stretch longer than eight consecutive paragraphs lacks interior experience; FAIL if that block remains dialogue/external action only.

summary: Chapter 11 lands required continuity beats (pre-dawn entry, federal seizure, Beau's right-wrist break, and retention of a seizure serial fragment), remains in canonical past tense, and shows no direct contradiction with the continuity sheet. It still fails review due to unresolved MEDIUM+/HIGH issues in craft/dialogue/prose: sanitizing summary at the seizure hinge, timidity in emotional follow-through, authority-voice convergence, constitution-violating clipped narration, repeated reveal formulas, and a 10+ paragraph interiority gap.
